name: Favorite Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 15 seconds
Cream butter; gradually add sugar, beating at medium speed with an electric mixer until light and fluffy. Add egg, and beat well. Add water and vanilla, mixing well. Combine flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg. Add to creamed mixture, mixing well. Stir in oats and pecans (if desired). Drop dough by rounded teaspoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets. Bake at 350°F for 10 to 12 minutes or until lightly browned. Cool slightly on cookie sheets; remove to wire racks to cool completely. Yield: about 8 dozen.
